name: uspec
description: Automate design system documentation — from Figma to finished specs. Generate API specs, color annotations, structure specs, screen reader specs, motion specs, component anatomy, and changelogs directly from Figma files.
author: Ian Guisard

skills.name: anatomy
skills.description: Generate component anatomy annotations with numbered markers and attribute tables for every element

skills.name: api
skills.description: Generate API specifications with properties, values, defaults, and configuration examples

skills.name: changelog
skills.description: Generate component changelogs documenting changes and updates

skills.name: color
skills.description: Generate color annotations with design token mapping for every element and state

skills.name: motion
skills.description: Generate motion specifications with animation timeline bars and easing details from After Effects data

skills.name: screen-reader
skills.description: Generate screen reader specifications for VoiceOver, TalkBack, and ARIA accessibility

skills.name: structure
skills.description: Generate structure specifications with dimensions, spacing, and padding across density and size variants

servers.name: figma-console
servers.description: Required for connecting to Figma files and extracting component data
